scripts.dev: cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8002 concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c red,cyan "python -m uvicorn Backend.main:app --app-dir ./ --host 127.0.0.1 --reload --port 8002" "npm --prefix Frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:8000: cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c red,cyan "python -m uvicorn Backend.main:app --app-dir ./ --host 127.0.0.1 --reload --port 8000" "npm --prefix Frontend run dev"
